title: NOX local micro-receipt
description: Signed local receipt issued by capsule_payment and accepted by publishers. Settled in batches against NOXReceiptSettlement on Ethereum mainnet.

user_wallet.description: Ethereum address of the wallet that signed the receipt.

publisher.description: Ethereum address of the publisher that will redeem the receipt.

amount_nox.description: Decimal NOX amount in base units. String to avoid float loss.

nonce.description: Monotonic per (user_wallet, publisher). Settlement contract rejects non-monotonic nonces.

epoch.description: Settlement epoch identifier. Receipts older than the last settled epoch are rejected on chain.

expiry_ms.description: Boot-time millisecond clock at which the receipt becomes invalid.

receipt_hash.description: BLAKE3 of the canonical receipt encoding, excluding the signature field.

signature.description: Wallet signature over receipt_hash. EIP-191 personal_sign format, 65 bytes hex.
